title: Call to Battle Vehicles Addon
description: Call to Battle Vehicles is an addon that adds WWII vehicles to Call to Battle WW2, the World War II mod for minecraft.
body:
![Call to Battle WW2 Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7574e3821ff263123d2332039a6abcd485bc0e9f.png)

Call to Battle now has vehicles with this addon!

**Don't have Call to Battle? It's a massive World War II conversion mod! Get it here:**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567b4066ce706dc81c95a21a12fa402b02b88a7a.png)

Call to Battle Vehicles adds vehicles that have a focus on being optimized and easy to use, fitting into minecraft's style of physics rather than try to do real-world physics simulations in a blocky world. 

There are many utility vehicles such as the Willys MB and Kubelwagen, Troop Transports like the Opel Blitz and CCKW, and more to come! :)

## Variants

Both the Willys MB and Kubelwagen have MG variants. The Willys has a center-mounted Browning M1919a4, and the Kubel has a side mounted MG-34. More MG variants will be coming soon!

There is also a Lend-Lease Soviet Willys MB, with Soviet coloring and markings!

## Multiplayer

These vehicles are available on Call to Battle's official server on various maps! Effective team play will allow you to unlock more vehicles and variations.

Requires base Call to Battle here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)
